data.name: Tales of Legendary Lust: Aphrodisia
data.detailed_description:
Tales of Legendary Lust is a hand-painted erotic adventure where you play as Captain Hale, a career soldier and infamous ladies' man, as he makes his way through a fantasy world full of hot women! Aphrodisia is an interactive visual novel covering the origin of Captain Hale's journey up until his arrival in Fort Ninevus!

MAIN FEATURES:

  • Relaxing sandbox gameplay in a cozy fantasy setting🌲

  • Storybook intro CYOA, multiple sizzling-hot adult scenes📜

  • Erotic segments woven into the game's campaign and quests💦

  • Branching dialogue, choices & consequences with varied outcomes🎲

  • Mediate disputes as a Legion Captain, and enforce or abuse the law⚔️

  • Harvest raw resources scattered through the world, mine, forage, hunt...⛏️

  • Role-play one of 10 unique Archetypes (Crusader, Diplomat, Warlord, etc.)👑

  • Enjoy hand-painted natural vistas & character portraits (game has no AI art)🎨

  • Explore conflict through story, not combat; words cut more than weapons 🎭

  • Meet and seduce horny women, ranging from mundane to magical races😊

  • Choose between Maledom / Romance / Femdom in special sex-scenes 🥵

  • Rekindle your relationship with Meredith, your loyal paladin waifu❤️

You are Captain Hale, a war-hero and frontiersman based by the remote Legion outpost of Fort Ninevus. Accompanying you is your trusty sidekick (and ex-girlfriend) Meredith von Mhyr, a sexy half-elven paladin. She's your confidante, best friend, and occasional lover...

Together you guard the frontier from threats, including the greenskins hordes... then spend quality time together when you're not busy adventuring or handling diplomatic matters! ♥

The recent crises have left women alone and fearful. Many have lost their husbands, fathers, brothers, and are in desperate need of a strong man! Help them with their troubles or offer them a shoulder to cry on, and you'll soon find them inviting you into their bed! Sleep with them, or refuse their advances while choosing material rewards over sexual gratification.

Dominant / Romantic / Submissive paths have also been woven into encounters to further spice them up! You can choose Maledom / Romance / Femdom to resolve some quests via sex! This won't always be the case, but it's present often enough to give you a fun sense of progression and freedom in how you handle things... along some extra spicy sex-scenes!

And for those truly special encounters, there's also a unique tier of adult scene in the form of CYOA books! These lengthy encounters are reserved for story characters, and offer branching paths that allow you to pick and choose how you navigate the lewd scene! Whether you're after kinky sex or gentle lovemaking, the CYOA storybooks have something for everyone!

Apart from its lewd content, the game offers robust role-playing opportunities, letting you pick from many choices that allow you to leave your mark on the world! Will you become a courageous crusader? A depraved lecher? A foolhardy drunkard? An oppressive tyrant? Or maybe something in between? The choice is always yours... along with the consequences of your actions! Archetypes let you decide what kind of Captain Hale you want to play as!

Vaginal Sex, Anal Sex, Oral Sex, Creampie, Consensual Male Domination, Consensual Female Domination, Romance, Feet Worship, Stockings, Footjob, Verbal Teasing, Dirty Talk, Titfuck, Fantasy Interracial (Raceplay), Scent Play / Saliva, Female Orgasm, MILF

NOTE: All lewd content in the game is optional; sex scenes are gated behind confirmation prompts for easy engagement or skipping. All characters are consenting adults (18+).

data.short_description: ToLLA is an adult-fantasy text adventure with a focus on role-playing and erotic art. Explore the magical world of Hortus in this interactive visual novel, solve quests, loot treasure, sleep with women, and grow your legend by wooing girls from diverse fantasy races! ❤️❤️❤️
data.reviews:
“An outstanding NSFW-fantasy adventure rich in lore! Superb narration. Well-written script. Charismatic characters. Stunning female models. Steamy Hscenes. Tons of kinks. Engaging gameplay! [👑10/10]”
Royal +18 Adult Games

“Rich dialogue trees and meaningful decisions make every playthrough unique. The campaign blends quests with personal arcs, inviting you to steer relationships and loyalties as captain of the legion.”
Kitty Cat Reviews

“Isometric RPG adventure with a dark fantasy theme. It has an extensive storyline with decision-making, EN VA, incredible unique art, and still sex scenes (vanilla) with immersive dialogues. 8⭐”
Hentai Pixels

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Microsoft® Windows® 10 / 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo (or better)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
